daily.today_energy: The universe is giving you main character energy today. Your magnetism is off the charts, and people are genuinely drawn to your vibe. Lean into whatever makes you feel most authentically you—the cosmos has your back.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, vulnerability is your superpower rn. If there's someone you've been vibing with, a genuine conversation could shift everything. Trust your gut on who deserves your emotional realness.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. This is the moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or take initiative on a project. Your confidence is contagious—let it inspire your team or colleagues to level up too.
daily.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement and rest in equal measure. Whether that's dancing, stretching, or just being still for a bit, tune in to what feels nourishing. Mental clarity follows when you honor your physical needs.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to lean into your authenticity, Leo. You're radiating a magnetic frequency that draws the right people closer. Trust the momentum building around you—something real is shifting.
weekly.love: Your vibe is irresistible rn, but the universe is asking you to be intentional about who gets access. Quality over quantity applies to connections too. If you're coupled up, vulnerability hits different this week.
weekly.career: Mercury's supporting your communication game hard. This is your moment to pitch ideas, have those convos you've been postponing, or just let your creative energy flow naturally. Your voice matters more than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, stretch, walk in nature—anything that reconnects you with feeling alive. Energy levels are steady; honor what your system actually needs.
